case_title: THOMASINA ALEXIS SHAW VS. NANCY TSE AKA NANCY YUEN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAW, THOMASINA ALEXIS AS TO DEFENDANT NANCY TSE AKA NANCY YUEN DOES 1 TO 100 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-30-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-30-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-15-2011
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-01-2012 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
NOTICE TO THE COURT RE: ARBITRATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAW, THOMASINA ALEXIS
ARBITRATOR FREEMAN DUVAL CULLOM APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FEB-22-2013 THROUGH MAY-23-2013.
PAYER NOTIFIED OF PARTIAL PAYMENT OF FEE
BALANCE OF FEE PAID FOR TRANSACTION W1011927F028 BY PLAINTIFF SHAW, THOMASINA ALEXIS
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SHAW, THOMASINA ALEXIS
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR RICHARD STEPHEN DIESTEL.
ARBITRATOR KENNETH GEORGE JOHNSON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-16-2012 THROUGH JUN-14-2012.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE FEB-21-2013.
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-30-2011 CONTINUED TO FEB-17-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY POLITO, DOMINIC
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAW, THOMASINA ALEXIS JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT NANCY TSE AKA NANCY YUEN
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED NOTICE OF CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE, ADR INFO PACKAGE, BLANK STIPULATION TO ADR, BLANK CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT, JUDICIAL MEDIATION PROGRAM SHEET, MEDIATION SERVICES BROCHURE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAW, THOMASINA ALEXIS SERVED NOV-05-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NANCY TSE AKA NANCY YUEN
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT NANCY TSE AKA NANCY YUEN
STIPULATION TO NON BINDING ARBITRATION FILED BY SHAW, THOMASINA ALEXIS NANCY TSE AKA NANCY YUEN
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF FEB-22-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAW, THOMASINA ALEXIS JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-05-2012. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-01-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 610. FEB-17-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-15-2012.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
